headline: Assessing Dollar General (DG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and current snapshot Dollar General (DG) has moved back into focus for investors after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock showing a 1.5% gain over the past day but weaker returns over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Dollar General. That short term weakness, with a 7 day share price return of 5.1% decline and 90 day share price return of 19.2% decline, sits alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 30.6%. This...
